name: Patient 45
history: Relationships sometimes shift to romantic connections. Past conflict following anger expressions. Complex relationship with parents involving obligations.
intermediate_belief: If I make a mistake, it will have catastrophic relationship consequences.
intermediate_belief_depression: My fear of mistakes paralyzes me in both work and relationships.
situation: Difficulty completing work tasks due to fear of making mistakes. Procrastination impacting productivity.
auto_thought: If I make an error, everything will fall apart and people will reject me.
behavior: Procrastinate on work tasks due to fear of mistakes.
